nasb.text: you shall not yield to him or listen to him; and your eye shall not pity him, nor shall you spare or conceal him.

esv.text: you shall not yield to him or listen to him, nor shall your eye pity him, nor shall you spare him, nor shall you conceal him.

cnv.text: 你都不可依從他，也不可聽從他；你的眼不可顧惜他，你不可憐憫他，也不可袒護他；

ccb.text: 你们不可迁就、听从他们，不可怜惜他们，不可放过或包庇他们。
